titleStmt.title: SII 16.91: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswami and G. S. Gai
No. 91. (A.R. No. 499 of 1906.) MŌPŪR, PULIVENDLA TALUK, CUDDAPAH DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a slab set up in front of the central shrine of the Bhairavēśvara temple.
This is dated Śaka 1452, Vikṛiti, Vaiśākha śu. 3, Sunday. It corresponds to 1530 A.D., April 30 if the month is Nija Vaiśākha. The weekday, however, was Saturday.

It records a gift of the durgadaṇāya-nivartana amounting to 235 varāhas per year �ayable from the villages belonging to Bhairavēśvara temple at Mōṁpūru for the carfestival of the god on the day of the Molakala-punnama by Ayyaparasu, son of Rāyasam Koṇḍamarasu of Bhāradvāja-gōtra and Āśvalāyana-sūtra. The donor is said to have obtained Ghaṇḍikōṭa-durga wherein Mōpūru was situated, as nāyaṅkara from the king.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . svastiśrī jayābhyudaya śālivāhana śakava
ruṣaṁbulu 1452 Agunēṭi vikṛtisaṁvatsara vaiśākha śu 3 Ā śrīma
drājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara śrīvīrapratāpa śrīvīra Acyu
tarāyamahārāyalu vidyānagaramaṁdunu ratnasiṁhāsa
nārūḍuṁḍai pṛthvisāṁbrājyaṁ cēyucuṁḍagānu ghaṁḍḍikōṭa
sīmalōni mōpūri bhayiravēśvaruniki bhāradvājagōtraṁ
Āśvalāyanasūtraṁ rukkuśābhādhyāyulayina rāya
saṁ koṁḍanurusayyagāri komāruṁḍu Ayyaparusugāru
yicina dānaśāsnakramameṭlaṁnnanu . svāmi mā nāyaṁkurānaku pāliṁ
ca navadhariṁcina ghaṁḍikōṭadu¨rgānaku cellē mōṁpūri bhayira
vēśvaruniki celē grāmālanu yēṁḍu 1 ki du¨rgānaku Acēṭi du
¨rggadaṇāyaniva¨rtanalu vaga 235 Ivē Akṣarālānu yiṁ
nūṭamuvaiAyidu varahālūnu mōṁpūri bhayiravēśva
runiki vaiśākhaśudha mōlakalapuṁnnama rathamahōtsavānaku
dēvuni Aṁggaraṁggavaibhavālakunnu mā svāmi Acyutarāyalaku pu
ṇyamuṁgānu tathātithi Akṣatadiya puṁṇyakālamaṁdu si
dhavaṭaṁ jyōti sidhēśvaruni saṁnnidhini sahiraṁṇyōdaka dānadhārā
pū¨rvakaṁgānu trivācikamugānu trikaraṇasudhigānu dhāravō
si yistimi Ācaṁdrā¨rkasthāyigānu cellirāvalenani yicina dha
¨rmaśāsanamu . Ī dha¨rmānaku yevvaru vighnamucēsinānu vā
raṇāsilōnu gōbrāṁhmaṁnni vadhiṁcina dōṣānaṁ bōyina
vāru gaṁgalōpalanu kapiladhēnuvunu caṁpina pāpāna
bōyinavāru . svadattā dviguṇaṁ puṁṇyaṁ paradattā
nupālanaṁ . paradattāpahārēṇa svadattaṁ niṣphalaṁ bhavēt .
dānapālanayō¨rmadhyē dānācchrēyōnupālanaṁ .
dānā[tsva¨rgamavā]pnōti pālanādacyutaṁ padaṁ .
Digital edition of SII 16.91 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
